description: Comprehensive AegisIDE architecture with user flow, NLU processing, and system components

components.user_flow: 7-step end-to-end interaction flow (Input → NLU → Router → Execution → Update → Response)
components.routers: 15 specialized routers grouped by function (Governance, Operations, Learning, Infrastructure)
components.workflows: 8 commands (auto-init, bootstrap, continue, fix, next, research, update, validate)
components.memory_bank: 8 runtime schemas (activeContext, scratchpad, kanban, mistakes, systemPatterns, progress, roadmap, memory)
components.mcp_tools: 6 mandatory tools (context7, fetch, git, sequential-thinking, exa, json-jq)
